policyMetadata.noncomplianceMessage: DRCP control 'drcp-aks-16 - Disable Command Invoke on Azure Kubernetes Service clusters'. For remediation, see https://confluence.office01.internalcorp.net:8453/display/DRCPKB/Incident+remediation+Kubernetes+Service#IncidentremediationKubernetesService-drcp-aks-16 .

policyDefinition.displayName: APG DRCP AKS Disable run command
policyDefinition.description: Disabling command invoke can enhance the security by avoiding bypass of restricted network access or Kubernetes role-based access control.

drcp.name: AKSDisableRunCommand
drcp.controlDesc: Disable Command Invoke on Azure Kubernetes Service clusters

metadata.description: Effect of this Azure Policy - Audit or Disabled.
